executive_summary.headline: NIL Fans rebooted its outreach engine after a 30-day gap. Two sequences rebuilt from audited lists are now live with 716 total members, while LinkedIn prospecting surged +94% in requests vs. baseline (720 vs 372).
top_risks: Apollo universe for Dir of Compliance audience approaching ceiling (~625 contacts)
0 replies and 0 meetings across both email sequences - engagement exists but no conversations converting yet
Athletic Directors LinkedIn campaign (623 requests, 9.3% reply rate) launched 5/2 - early but showing traction

sequences.name: MMai - NIL Fans - Team - NIL Directors & Compliance - Demo Outreach - Mar 2026 - Anna - v2
MMai - NIL Fans - Team - Division II & III Athlete Activation - Sequence - Mar 2026 - Anna - v2

email_sequence_summary.bookings_disclaimer: Meetings/bookings are not currently tracked in the system and there are no calendar booking CTAs in the sequences.

email.notes: Volume lower due to sequences paused/rebuilt 5/19. Open rate improved 2.7pp (118%). 10 replies in baseline dropped to 0 - current sequences in early steps.

sequences.name: NIL Directors & Compliance Demo Outreach - Shanon Gray

linkedin.notes: LinkedIn ramped significantly - Rounds 2 AD campaign (launched 5/2) drove 623 of 720 current-period requests. Accept rate dipped slightly (16.5% vs 17.2%) but replies up 3 (10 to 13). Compliance campaign has best reply rate at 14.3%.

sequences_audited.original_name: MMai - NIL Fans - Team - NIL Directors & Compliance - Demo Outreach - Mar 2026 - Anna - v2
issues: 222 of 416 contacts (53%) failed to load - stuck errors
127 off-ICP contacts: 96 CFO/COO/CRO athletic finance, 16 Title IX-only, 5 ADA/504, 5 Financial Aid, 3 Research Compliance, 2 other
No suppression list - previously sequenced contacts had no exclusion mechanism
Platform unable to export sequence members (manual screenshot extraction required)
sequences_audited.notes: Suppression list built (219 confirmed sequenced contacts) uploaded to Apollo as NILFans_Suppression_Master. Combined list: audited April export (213 contacts) + audited v2 Apollo pull (180 contacts, 24 removed). Apollo universe ~625 contacts - approaching ceiling.

pending_actions: Shanon Gray's Athletic Directors sequence needs same suppression audit
Build Division II & III Athlete Activation sequence or retire it
Monitor new Compliance Directors sequence (v3) for deliverability vs original 53% load failure rate

contact_pipeline.universe_status: Approaching ceiling - net-new contacts will require audience expansion or re-engagement of suppressed list

next_steps.label: High Priority — This Period
next_steps.description: Audit the Athletic Directors sequence — same cleanup as Compliance Directors (remove off-target contacts, build suppression list, verify emails, relaunch)

next_steps.label: Medium Priority
next_steps.description: Decide whether to launch the Division II & III Athlete Activation sequence or retire it — currently inactive with no activity

next_steps.label: Medium Priority
next_steps.description: Expand the Compliance Directors audience — explore adding Title IX Coordinators and Athletic Compliance Officers to keep the pipeline growing

next_steps.label: Monitor
next_steps.description: Watch the new Compliance Directors v3 sequence for deliverability — we expect better results than the original 53% load failure. Review at next report.

performance_insights.title: Email engagement has improved significantly
performance_insights.body: The percentage of people opening our emails doubled — from 2.27% in the first period to 4.96% now. Clicks also improved (2.0% to 3.33%). The Athletic Directors sequence leads with a 5.77% open rate.

performance_insights.title: We audited the audience to ensure fit with the message
performance_insights.body: This cleanup started on May 19th — the same day this report was generated. The change is already made, but we won't see the improvement until the new sequence has run for a few weeks. We'll track this closely in the next report.

performance_insights.title: LinkedIn outreach is picking up real traction
performance_insights.body: Across two campaigns, we've connected with 119 people and received 13 responses. The Compliance Directors campaign has the strongest reply rate (14.3%), while the Athletic Directors campaign (launched May 2) is generating high volume with 623 connection requests.

performance_insights.title: We've identified most of the people who match our target audience
performance_insights.body: Going forward, we should look at adding similar job titles — like Title IX Coordinators and Athletic Compliance Officers — to keep finding new people to reach out to. This keeps the pipeline fresh as our current list naturally shrinks.
